data: Group Discussion - Contract Jobs vs. Permanent Jobs
Group Discussion - Contract Jobs vs. Permanent Jobs
Learn how to discuss contract jobs and permanent jobs in a group discussion

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to discuss Contract Jobs vs. Permanent Jobs in a group discussion.

Using the right structure helps you speak clearly and confidently.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to talk about what something offers or contributes, use this structure:

"[Topic] offers [advantage]."

For example: "Contract jobs offer flexibility and diverse work experience."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If someone asks about the benefits of permanent jobs, you can say:

"Permanent jobs offer stability and long-term career growth."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Next!

message:
When you want to mention both the advantage and the drawback, use this structure:

"While [topic] offers [advantage], it also has a [drawback]."

For example: "While contract jobs offer flexibility, it also has a lack of job security."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice discussing contract jobs vs. permanent jobs!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to talk about what contract jobs offer

1.Contract jobs offer flexibility and diverse work experience.
2.Contract jobs are never a good option for professionals.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to talk about the drawback of permanent jobs

1.Permanent jobs have no benefits and are not worth it.
2.While permanent jobs offer stability, it also has limited variety in work.

Correct answer: 2
Contract jobs offer a variety of projects and industries to gain experience.
While contract jobs offer independence, it also has the challenge of building long-term professional relationships.
Permanent jobs offer a sense of belonging and a strong team culture.
While permanent jobs offer security, it also has the drawback of limited variety in projects.
Contract jobs offer a chance to build a broad professional skill set.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. What does a contract job offer to an employee? Use Structure 1.'

'2. While a contract job offers flexibility, what risk does it also bring? Respond using Structure 2.'

'3. What does a permanent job offer to an employee? Use Structure 1.'

'4. While a permanent job offers stability, what challenge does it also bring? Give your answer using Structure 2.'

'5. What does a contract job offer to a company? Use Structure 1.'"
